title: Corrigendum to G.S.R 826E
text: jftLVªh laö Mhö ,yö&33004@99 REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 60] ubZ fnYyh] lkseokj] tuojh 25] 2016@ek?k 5] 1937 No. 60] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, JANUARY 25, 2016/ MAGHA 5 , 1937 ᭭ वा᭭ ᭝य और पᳯरवार क᭨याण मंᮢ ालय (᭭ वा᭭ ᭝य और पᳯरवार क᭨याण िवभाग) शु ि᳍-पᮢ नई ᳰद᭨ली, 25 जनवरी, 2016 सा.का.िन. 104(अ).-भारत सरकार के ᭭ वा᭭᭝य और पᳯरवार क᭨याण मंᮢालय, ᭭ व ा᭭᭝य और पᳯरवार क᭨याण िवभाग कᳱ भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (i), तारीख 30 अ᭍तूबर, 2015 मᱶ ᮧकािशत अिधसूचना सं᭎यांक सा.का.िन. 826 (अ), तारीख 30 अ᭍तूबर, 2015 के पृ᭬ठ 2 कᳱ पंिᲦ 23 मᱶ “अनुसूची म के” के ᭭ थान पर “अनुसूची म मᱶ,” पढ़ᱶ । [फा.सं. X-11014/4/2014-डी.एफ.᭍यू.सी] कुंदन लाल शमाᭅ, संयु᭍त सिचव MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health and Family Welfare) CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 25th January, 2016 G.S.R. 104(E).- In the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Department of Health and Family Welfare, number G.S.R. 826 (E), dated the 30th October, 2015, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) on 30th October, 2015, at page 4, in line 1, for “Schedule”, read “Schedule Y”. [F.No. X-11014/4/2014-DFQC] K.L. SHARMA, Jt. Secy. 396 GI/2016 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
